name: grep
description: Search file contents using ripgrep. Use this to find function/class/variable definitions, imports, error messages, TODO comments, or any text pattern in code files. Do not use this for filename search (use glob) or directory structure (use tree). Returns matching lines with file:line:content format. Results sorted by modification time (newest first).

pattern.description: Search pattern. By default, interpreted as a regex. Use literal=true for exact string match.

path.description: Directory path to search in. Defaults to current working directory.

type.description: File extension filter without dot (e.g., go, py, ts, js). Repeatable. Corresponds to ripgrep --type flag.

literal.description: When true, treat pattern as literal text instead of regex. Use this when searching for symbols that contain regex special characters (e.g., brackets, dots).

max.description: Maximum number of matching lines to return. Truncates results if exceeded.

context.description: Number of source code lines to show before and after each match. Default is 0 (no context).

name: glob
description: Search filenames using fd. Use this to find files by name or extension pattern (e.g., *.go, *_test.go, config*.json). Do not use this for content search (use grep) or directory structure (use tree). Returns full file paths sorted by modification time (newest first).

pattern.description: Glob pattern for filename matching (e.g., *.go, *test*.py, config?.json). Uses fd syntax, not regex.

path.description: Directory path to search in. Defaults to current working directory.

type.description: Filter type: f for files only, d for directories only.

max.description: Maximum number of file paths to return. Truncates results if exceeded.

name: tree
description: Display directory structure using tree command. Use this to understand project layout, explore unfamiliar codebases, or view the overall organization. Do not use this for file content search (use grep) or filename search (use glob). Shows directory tree with optional depth limit and file sizes.

path.description: Directory path to display. Defaults to current working directory.

depth.description: Maximum directory depth levels to display. Default is 3. Use 1 for shallow view.

size.description: Show file sizes in human-readable format (KB, MB) alongside each file.

name: check
description: Verify dependencies (ripgrep, fd, tree) are installed and accessible. Run this before using other commands to ensure the required CLI tools are available. This tool has no parameters.
